Description: A single AI system may not operate under more than one active override simultaneously
Provisional Note: Proposed as a provisional default; institutions may calibrate based on portfolio size and risk tolerance

Description: All active overrides maintained in a single, auditable register visible to the governance committee

If more than two AI systems are operating under active overrides, or if any single gate generates overrides across more than 30% of deployed systems, the governance committee must convene a structural review
Provisional Note: 30% is a proposed starting point requiring local calibration

Description: Documented rationale from the accountable clinical lead

Provisional Note: Proposed as a provisional pilot default requiring empirical calibration rather than a quasi-canonical value
